rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in component type scopes for assumptions and guarantees referring to ports, and in implementation scopes for bindings.
Insert AGREE contracts after relevant subcomponents and connections in implementation scopes.
generic_rules: Use component type scopes for component-level assumptions and guarantees.
Ensure AGREE expressions reference only visible identifiers from the AADL model.
Validate that AGREE types match AADL data types for ports and variables.
Avoid encoding AADL properties as AGREE variables unless explicitly exposed.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Assumptions and guarantees should reference component ports only through valid variables or outputs.
Implementation-level bindings are placed in component implementation annexes.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes.
Do not reference subcomponent ports directly in component type contracts.
Do not assume AADL property names are automatically available in AGREE scope.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
AADL annex placement and fusion rules
